name: m1_diff_secret_in_diff
description: A captured diff that introduces a secret has the secret scrubbed in place; the secret appears in neither the thin-log nor the diff sidecar, and diff_scrubbed is recorded.

events.diff:
diff --git a/throughlog/app.py b/throughlog/app.py
--- a/throughlog/app.py
+++ b/throughlog/app.py
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 import os
+API_KEY = "sk-ant-api03-ABCDEF1234567890abcdefGHIJ"
